query_title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs. Bizarro League

recommendations.title: Superman: Doomsday
recommendations.overview: When LexCorp accidentally unleashes a murderous creature, Superman meets his greatest challenge as a champion. Based on the "The Death of Superman" storyline that appeared in DC Comics' publications in the 1990s.
recommendations.director: Lauren Montgomery, Bruce Timm, Brandon Vietti

recommendations.title: DC Showcase - Batman: Death in the Family
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes the Batman's life again when Robin Jason Todd tracks down his birth mother only to run afoul of the Joker. An adaptation of the 1988 comic book storyline of the same name.

recommendations.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
recommendations.overview: In 1985, the murder of a government-sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement and into a mystery that threatens to upend their personal lives and the world itself.

recommendations.title: Batman: Under the Red Hood
recommendations.overview: One part vigilante, one part criminal kingpin, Red Hood begins cleaning up Gotham with the efficiency of Batman, but without following the same ethical code.

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.

recommendations.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League - Gotham City Breakout
recommendations.overview: The caped crusader reluctantly agrees to let Batgirl and Nightwing take him on a long overdue vacation from crime-fighting, while Superman and the Justice League watch over Gotham City.

recommendations.title: The Batman/Superman Movie: World's Finest
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure
recommendations.overview: As the Joker visits Metropolis with a plan to kill Superman for Lex Luthor, Batman pursues the clown to Superman's turf.

recommendations.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
recommendations.overview: Suspicious of the events ensnaring their former colleagues, Nite Owl and Silk Spectre are spurred out of retirement to investigate. As they grapple with personal ethics, inner demons and a society turned against them, they race the clock to uncover a

recommendations.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League - Attack of the Legion of Doom!

recommendations.title: Reign of the Supermen
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: In the wake of The Death of Superman, the world is still mourning the loss of the Man of Steel following his fatal battle with the monster Doomsday. However, no sooner as his body been laid to rest than do four new bearers of the Superman shield come
